/CAL:PHC/X:THIS CASE IS ON STWPX AS OF 02-10-22/FAVRPT/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITION IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:/X:HOME DETENTION IS TERMINATED & DEFENDANT HAS NO MORE CURFEW/ /X:ELECTRONIC MONITORING REMAINS/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY RELEASE CONDITION/X: MOTION  GRANTED,/EMMOD: COURT ORDERS HOME DETENTION MODIFIED TO PERMIT DEFENDANT TO TRAVEL TO AND FROM JOB INTERVIEWS AND TO TRAVEL TO AND FROM WORK AT DOOR DASH/X: 05-02-22 DATE IS CONFIRMED,/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/WEAP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/NTW/LDPX:02-15-22/X:60TH 04-01-22/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: PD TO DECLARE A CONFLICT/DAWT/CON: RICHARD SHIKMAN/CONTD: PREHEARINGCONFERENCE/DOP/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/
